{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323203849A80D1CFCA24262C26771"}"},"total":260},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7435494942650811198","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一本较为新颖的星际天灾文，看评论区说是有星际战甲的内容。开头个别特殊词汇比较难懂不能理解（后面作者有解释）+前面的剧情因为不了解导致我确实有点看不下去，但后面的剧情还是很有意思的。剧情慢热，注重于发展与第四天灾们的提升。然后就是一不小心就看完了，因为喜欢里面各种设定，各种奇奇怪怪的支线剧情，各个人物的有趣经历与故事。最后，还是希望作者快快更新🧐","text_exts":[{"e":24,"s":20,"text":"星际战甲","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%98%9F%E9%99%85%E6%88%98%E7%94%B2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426952962C26771%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227435494942650811198%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227360246920125631550%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%98%9F%E9%99%85%E6%88%98%E7%94%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":105,"s":101,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426952962C26771%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227435494942650811198%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227360246920125631550%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731216306,"group_id":"7360246920125631550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世界无边无际，我的等待也许只是一个人的坚持。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4QbTQfE+2ByF+1CuynIOGI=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d459c1d716234bc398bc2611f5f93225~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792205&x-signature=v3oe%2B4LIrK9ipixnP%2BARiGvDAlo%3D","user_id":"571401461826463","user_name":"悲灵零"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"571401461826463","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7360246920125631550","book_info":{"abstract":"【星际战甲】【无女主】【幕后】【群像】【发育流】穿越虚空来到异界，夏商再次醒来，整个始源星系都已陷入成百上千年的混乱纷争。
过去奥罗帝国的辉煌都腐败在时间长河中，它的鲸落也哺育了更多全新崛起的势力。
由克隆人武装统治，智力不高暴力不俗的克洛尼帝国，蚕食最多的奥罗遗产。
由狡诈商人白手放高利贷起家，被利润二字充斥整个会议的库普斯商会，钻研了最精深的奥罗科技。
还有不知从何而来，就连奥罗帝国都没研究明白的神秘宇宙病毒，感染物遍布整个星系。
反叛克洛尼统治的武装军，苟活利润压迫下的联盟，在三方势力逼迫下艰难维生的帝国遗民与幸存者们。
夏商：“是的，属于战士的时代已经过去，但我从过去回来了，我将带来独属于我的战士。”
“穿越虚空，前往始源星系，玩家，你准备好了吗？”
